summary: EXP-227 corrects the critical Schlegel & Füllekrug 1999 (DOI 10.1029/1999JA900056) citation-direction error in WIN-061 detail_evidence. SF1999 actually reported damping DECREASE / frequency INCREASE during SPEs (cavity-Q enhancement) — the opposite of the suppression we attributed to it. Two patch_anchors: (A) paragraph-1 opening replaced to acknowledge the literature is direction-conflicted (SF1999 enhancement; Pazos et al. 2019 amplitude increases at Coeneo) and to remove the false 'literature documents reduced cavity-Q' claim; (B) V51.1 Update paragraph rewritten to drop the now-deleted 'reduced cavity-Q' mechanism (resolves ISS-1416 simultaneously), drop the spurious '(2026-04-08)' date, and reframe PRED-SR-SUPPRESS as a direction-and-magnitude assertion with no a-priori constraint that becomes confirmable only after the 2026-04-19 GOES-19 power-law refit chose a downward direction. Adds Pazos et al. 2019 (DOI 10.1016/j.jastp.2019.105091) as a direction-conflicting reference. Net: detail_evidence grows ~2951 → ~3938 chars; verdict and tldr unchanged (CONFIRMED stays). Decider should also update WIN-061's evidence_links if those are stored separately. Note: ISS-1417 and ISS-1418 (still status=open, not assigned-analyst) are deferred — this proposal does not claim to close them.
